title: Cryptool announces MultiversX as main chain partner
content_html:
Cryptool is announcing a main chain partnership with MultiversX.

MultiversX will support our roadmap with grants and ecosystem access. For platform users this means a fast, low-fee network behind everyday transactions, and a tight integration with the MultiversX ecosystem.

This partnership sits behind the upcoming Raise and Portfolio modules, which are the next pieces of the platform going live.
